reviews.review_description: This game is one of the best games I've played since I have had my vr
The multi-player is the shizzle! The game looks awesome and I hope more games like this come out.
I actually don't get how this was accepted in the Oculus store. Framerate is very choppy on my S7 Edge...

This game is one that I did not think I would enjoy. However once I got used to the controls and the actual objective of the Game, I was better able to enjoy it. This game has great graphics, and easy control system, semi interesting music, and is easy to get addicted to. 

The only problem that I continue to have with it is that the Gear control is not compatible with its sensor for pointing. That would be a definite plus for the developers to include this.

And also, the forces never move like you tell them too..... and t he biggest thing minutes is that the production levels never increase. Maybe there's an answer, but you have to learn all of it on your own. Without their ridiculous tutorials.

reviews.review_title: Almost brings a tear to youe eye!! Awsom
reviews.review_description: Been waiting patiently since this first landed as a,demo. WOW worth the wait. Awsome

reviews.review_title: Good game, but with some defects
reviews.review_description: The game is quite fun once you get the hang of it, and you can spend a lot of time playing and still enjoy it. However, the developer could make a few easy tweaks that would make the game so much better. 1) It would be great to be able to go back to an easier difficulty in campaign mode. You are currently forced to move up for some reason and cannot even reset it. 2) The requirement to rotate units is annoying, especially given that the AI can use the same units and strategy round after round. I would like to be able to choose whatever unit I want, or else free them up every other battle. At the very least, the AI shouldn't get to use the same units repeatedly when you cannot. 3) Would be great to be able to personally command all my battles. Having chance decide other battles is very annoying in the higher levels as the odds are not in your favor. Not sure why this would be hard to add into the game.

reviews.review_title: My favorite game on the VR so far!
reviews.review_description: I wish multiplayer was quicker but at least with the new update we have skirmish while we wait.
I feel like I waited ages for this game to come out.  The wait was worth it.

At first this game is really enjoyable but its sadly flawed. Moving you up to the highest level after each victory in campaign with no way to return to an easier level (short of un and reinstalling) soon takes the fun away also forcing you to use certain  
Weaponry each turn is annoying. Maybe multiplayer can get my interest back not tried it yet but for now it's only 3 stars.

reviews.review_title: Love both of E McNeil's games!
reviews.review_description: I only recently found out the two games I am addicted to most on Gear VR are both made by the same developer. Not sure why but I love his style! Dev more! Take all my money, please!
Fully supports GO controller, and a surprisingly solid RTS game in VR.

reviews.review_title: Rated for fun factor & artistic choices.
reviews.review_description: I may not understand why the full app is a few MB less than the demo, but I am happy with the purchase.

I run a VR program twice a week for youth in a juvenile detention center.  I am always looking for content that challenges their minds,  help them be more strategic in their decision making. This game delivers like few others.  It has become an instant hit amongst the youth.  The ability to easily connect and play against each other helps immensely.  I run four Quests and three Gos, and the cross platform play is excellent.  I am also a veteran so I'm able to later expand their military understanding with educational videos of what the are doing and what it looks like in real world.  I will say again,  powerful tool for this population in learning and practicing strategic skills.

reviews.review_title: Love this game, wish it had more depth
reviews.review_description:
What a cool game.  It offers streamlined fast paced real time strategy gameplay with a Tron-like aesthetic played over a holographic table.
It has a skirmish and campaign mode as well as a PvP skirmish mode.

Pick three units with varying strengths and weaknesses then battle for control of outposts on the map.  Outposts produce units, which unit is chosen when you capture it.  There are no build queues or base building.  You can upgrade or boost your outposts each has its advantages.

Tougher AI and a little more gameplay depth would have been great but what is there is more than adequate.  A lot of the strategy is in which units you pick to use.

Not a lot of people playing this online either though the option to skirmish with an AI while you wait is a great feature.  The best part of the game is watching the units battle, there is a fantastic sense of depth and scale.  The camera can be adjusted in the options menu so you can be as close or far away from tye action as you want.  Have a birds eye view of the battlefield or get your nose right down by the table.

reviews.review_title: One of the best games on gear VR!
reviews.review_description: This game is addictive! Good resolution and strategy, lots of troop options! Definitely a must, worth every penny!

Love the game, literally only two of many games that I've paid for and play more than an hour, I can't put it down... well until my screen overheats anyways. Lol. One thing to improve: add co-op with friends.  I would love the option to play against and also team up with my friends to battle other groups.  That's the only thing I see that's missing! Hats off to the studio that put this together!

I was really excited to play this but after a few attempts it would go download but then it says that it couldn't download the game. I have a great internet connection and an S8+ so I don't know what to do.

reviews.review_title: Best VR RTS on the store!
reviews.review_description: This game is super fun, and looks nice. Everything looks holographic and very nice. The gameplay is fun, and the bots are competent enough that I don't get bored with them. I haven't yet been able to find a real player online to play with, but I think that is due to the fact that not many people know about this game. It is very challenging and I though it was worth my money.
Very nice graphics and fun gameplay. But once you finish a campain, it sets the difficulty higher.
Great gameplay and design. Only flaws are lack of gear vr controller support plus occasional lag that causes some dizziness when there are A lot of units on the field.
